# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
  - path: gcp-types/compute-v1:instances
  - path: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  - path: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
  - path: gcp-types/compute-v1:healthChecks
  - path: gcp-types/compute-v1:backendServices
  - path: gcp-types/compute-v1:urlMaps
  - path: gcp-types/compute-v1:targetHttpProxies
  - path: gcp-types/compute-v1:forwardingRules

resources:
- name: my-compute-instance
  type: compute-v1:instances
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20191014
    networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default

- name: my-cloud-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        binaryLogEnabled: true

- name: my-cloud-storage-bucket
  type: storage-v1:buckets
  properties:
    location: US

- name: my-health-check
  type: compute-v1:healthChecks
  properties:
    type: TCP

- name: my-backend-service
  type: compute-v1:backendServices
  properties:
    healthChecks:
      - $(ref.my-health-check.selfLink)

- name: my-url-map
  type: compute-v1:urlMaps
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: my-target-http-proxy
  type: compute-v1:targetHttpProxies
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.my-url-map.selfLink)

- name: my-forwarding-rule
  type: compute-v1:forwardingRules
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    target: $(ref.my-target-http-proxy.selfLink)
